title: UAKS Validation Event
description: Schema for recording atom review and validation state transitions. Every promotion or demotion in the governance lifecycle (DRAFT -> DISTILLED -> REVIEWED -> VERIFIED, or DISPUTED/DEPRECATED) is recorded as a validation event. Derived from UAKS v1 Architecture Specification section 16.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this validation event.

atomId.description: The atom whose validation state changed.

reviewer.description: Identifier of the reviewer (human username, agent ID, or 'automated').

reviewType.description: Classification of the review that produced this state change.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation for the state change.

findings.description: Specific issues or observations from the review.

policyRef.description: Reference to the governance policy that authorized this transition.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the validation event.
